CustomField.description: Grant Claim Received per month delivery
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the amount of grant funding you have received/expect to receive, from SHDF at the end of each month. Needs to be simplified to make it easy for GRs to understand how it works/ what it means. Do not allow GRs to put in more money across the scheme than their grant award amount. Is this needed if the drawdowns have a separate section (finance)
CustomField.label: Grant Claim Received per month delivery
